title: Pige UI requirement, prototype, and production coverage matrix
status: Active UI Design audit; gaps are intentionally explicit and are not release-status claims

audited_against.visual_reference: ChatGPT-branded Codex desktop client 26.707.72221 clean-room observable behavior

status_definitions.covered: The required surface and deterministic state transition exist in this artifact.
status_definitions.partial: A useful foundation exists, but at least one required state, action, responsive mode, or accessibility behavior is absent.
status_definitions.missing: The required user-visible surface or action is not present.
status_definitions.implemented: The production renderer contains the user-visible flow on the audited baseline; this is not a release-status promotion.
status_definitions.not_applicable: The requirement belongs to another artifact or service and has no user-visible control on this surface.

rules: Prototype coverage and production implementation are reported separately.
A static card, toast, or route is never counted as a completed production action.
Every partial or missing item must name the smallest user-visible completion boundary.
Pixel fidelity is accepted only after canonical-size and narrow-size screenshot comparison, not by route availability alone.
Production status is a read-only UI audit of the named baseline and does not replace Development tests or governed acceptance evidence.

requirements.requirement: Compact Home, expanded workspace, and three-pane reading use stable pane widths and preserve the active task.
requirements.gap: Production still exposes implementation-oriented C/W/F controls and does not yet provide the complete stable three-pane shell.

requirements.requirement: Sidebar toggle, pin, navigation, and Settings entry use accurate semantics with no decorative history controls.
requirements.gap: Production topbar still uses text placeholders for pane and window controls and keeps Settings inside the primary renderer view.

requirements.requirement: First run can create, open, or restore a local vault with clear local-first copy.
requirements.gap: Visual-review the new restore preview at canonical and narrow sizes; production remains the authority for native destination and irreversible confirmation copy.

requirements.requirement: Model connection is optional; skipping enters capture-only and can resume preserved work later.
requirements.gap: The audited baseline has the foundation, while final single-owner missing-model convergence remains in a separate Development candidate.

requirements.requirement: One composer accepts ordinary conversation, questions, text, URLs, and files without user-selected intent modes.
requirements.gap: Keep the product path Pi-owned; do not reintroduce renderer question or source routing heuristics.

requirements.requirement: Enter sends, Shift+Enter inserts a newline, IME composition and its end race never send, and duplicate submissions are blocked.
requirements.gap: Retain regression coverage for keyboard, button, attachment, whitespace, repeat, and in-flight paths.

requirements.requirement: Picker and whole-window drop preserve one or more files through one Home-owned ingress with visible attachment state.
requirements.gap: No current prototype or production ownership gap; retain picker/drop race, duplicate, unsupported, removal, and multi-file regression coverage.

requirements.requirement: URL and file appearance do not select a workflow; detected source state remains editable before submit.
requirements.gap: Canonical and narrow visual review remains for the new pre-submit URL and attachment routes.

requirements.requirement: Supported macOS voice input has listening, stop, editable transcript, error, and unsupported states without auto-send.
requirements.gap: Prototype covers supported, unsupported, and typed microphone-permission failure states. Development still needs the Speech Service bridge and real platform behavior.

requirements.requirement: One safe provisional answer bubble receives monotonic replacements and is authoritatively replaced or cleared.
requirements.gap: Maintain final-only citations and clearing on cancel, error, vault change, and older conversation load.

requirements.requirement: Ordinary answers work without vault evidence; optional retrieval shows grounded synthesis and final-only stable citations; explicit vault-only can report insufficient evidence.
requirements.gap: Do not fabricate retrieval, citations, or insufficient-evidence semantics when Pi did not request vault-only behavior.

requirements.requirement: Recent work is secondary, compact, durable-change oriented, and owns cancel, retry, open, and Undo actions without duplicate status surfaces.
requirements.gap: Keep conversation-owned model waits and active confirmation Jobs out of duplicate Recent Work pills.

requirements.requirement: Current-action Permission Broker and model-egress confirmations are compact, body-free, one-use, fail-closed, accessible, and sole status owners.
requirements.gap: No saved grant, Remember, raw body, path, endpoint, model ID, command, or provider detail may leak into these cards.

requirements.requirement: Missing-model and retryable failure states expose exactly one localized status owner and one relevant action.
requirements.gap: Final race-safe ownership and Models-local recovery are pending in the frozen replacement Development candidate.

requirements.requirement: Supported format glyphs remain a static informational legend, while the composer exposes one real model switcher with green connected and red unavailable truth.
requirements.gap: Development must keep format hints non-interactive, bind the listbox to enabled models and typed availability, and disable submit for an unavailable selection without adding a second model-status owner.

requirements.requirement: Active file processing collapses to one current filename and expands to five visible 44 px progress rows with internal scrolling, pause/continue, removal, and safe focus return.
requirements.gap: Development must project typed file Jobs into this single owner; pause/remove semantics must preserve source evidence, and more than five rows must scroll inside the fixed panel rather than resize the composer.

requirements.requirement: Expanded sidebar exposes an Agent-maintained Library tree with at least three visible levels and keyboard disclosure.
requirements.gap: Development needs stable group identities, expansion persistence, active row, focus management, and note open by page ID.

requirements.requirement: Library provides Notes, Sources, Topics, and Tags without adding duplicate top-level navigation.
requirements.gap: Prototype provides four quiet families plus loading and body-free unavailable truth. Development still needs the complete typed Library family service and these states.

requirements.requirement: One local search covers notes, sources, topics, and tags with explicit no-result state.
prototype_evidence: real loading/unavailable/retry/no-result and ArrowLeft/ArrowRight/Home/End browser walkthrough
requirements.gap: Prototype covers live filtering, explicit no-result, typed loading/unavailable truth, one retry, and roving family tabs. Development still needs typed search result families and equivalent keyboard/focus behavior.

requirements.requirement: Knowledge Tree is a separate semantic hierarchy with individually selectable nodes, automatic focus zoom, refined branch motion, evidence counts, backlinks, and suggested-link confidence where useful.
prototype_evidence: 48-456 interactive treeitems across six deterministic mock distributions
requirements.gap: Prototype includes deterministic weight/count/evidence-driven growth across sparse, balanced, dominant-domain, dual-core, long-tail, and mature-dense data; 48-456 interactive nodes; focus zoom/pan; branch emphasis; search/filter/modes; bounded evidence/backlink/suggestion actions; and empty/loading/degraded truth. Production still needs the governed typed graph projection and equivalent interaction breadth.

requirements.requirement: Notes open as a calm rendered Markdown surface with compact metadata, stable overflow, readable measure, and sanitized content.
requirements.gap: Continue visual regression for headings, lists, blockquotes, tables, code, images, wiki links, and citations at narrow and wide sizes.

requirements.requirement: Reader exposes related pages, backlinks, source references, and source-versus-Agent interpretation without raw filesystem paths.
requirements.gap: Prototype presents stable source/citation actions without raw paths. Development must bind them to stable source/page IDs and typed unavailable truth.

requirements.requirement: Left Library rail and right Agent/context rail can be hidden independently while the reading measure remains stable.
requirements.gap: The HTML now has independent pane toggles, an intermediate-width Library drawer, and a narrow Agent drawer; persisted pane state remains a Development implementation concern.

requirements.requirement: Wide notes expose a contextual Note Agent that can answer, suggest links, and stage edits without auto-writing.
requirements.gap: Development needs the current-note typed context bridge, read-only answer state, proposal lifecycle, cancellation, error, and narrow drawer.

requirements.requirement: Text selection exposes compact local and Agent actions without obscuring content; mutating actions preserve original text until confirmation.
requirements.gap: Development needs native selection anchoring, keyboard dismissal, copy/quote local actions, Agent handoff, and mutation proposal boundaries.

requirements.requirement: Dataset results persist as a readable table with stable source citation and survive reopen.
requirements.source: PRD Dataset acceptance; UI_PROTOTYPE reader contract
requirements.gap: Keep horizontal overflow, narrow layout, citation opening, and empty/error states in visual regression.

requirements.requirement: Settings opens through one independent, stable-size surface and returning does not resize or lose the main workspace.
production_evidence: Settings currently rendered as main View
requirements.gap: Development needs a dedicated Settings BrowserWindow with route restore, close/return focus, stable dimensions, and shared typed settings state.

requirements.requirement: General, appearance, app language, and knowledge language are grouped simply and apply with explicit scope.
requirements.gap: Production needs the grouped Settings pages, theme behavior, storage/apply semantics, and six-locale copy inside the Settings surface.

requirements.requirement: Vault, note storage, backup/restore, and index maintenance expose safe locations and repair actions with no destructive ambiguity.
requirements.gap: Move the implemented foundation into the grouped Settings surface and complete index-maintenance separation and body-free repair errors.

requirements.requirement: Models shows provider-grouped enabled models and one Global Default; presets ask only required credentials; custom protocol and endpoint stay progressively disclosed.
requirements.gap: Complete preset/custom separation, provider-level bootstrap probe, discovery retry/custom fallback, model enable state, grouped Global Default, and scoped body-free errors.

requirements.requirement: Local Capabilities owns local RAG, OCR, speech, parsers, and bundled toolchain health with progressive repair actions.
requirements.gap: Development needs typed capability status, optional download consent, install progress, diagnostics, retry/remove, and no hidden ordinary-flow downloads.

requirements.requirement: Agent and Memory makes local memory inspectable, reversible, scoped, and separable from PIGE.md policy.
requirements.gap: Development needs typed list, provenance, disable/delete/export, confirmation, and backup-scope behavior.

requirements.requirement: Permissions and Privacy exposes the default cloud-send posture, stricter progressive choices, sensitive/restricted behavior, saved grants, and explicit YOLO controls.
production_evidence: Current-action Permission Broker and model egress only
requirements.gap: Development needs settings storage/effect wiring, saved-grant management, revocation, YOLO confirmation/indicator, and privacy-copy enforcement.

requirements.requirement: Skills and Pi Packages show reviewed capability, source, version, permission scope, install/enable/remove state, and advanced catalog only by disclosure.
requirements.gap: Development needs signed/verified package metadata, Permission Broker mediation, progress, retry, disable/remove, and body-free failures.

requirements.requirement: Updates and diagnostics expose update state, local-only redacted support preview/export, and safe diagnostic clearing.
production_evidence: diagnostics and support bundle foundation in VaultSettingsPanel
requirements.gap: Move diagnostics into System Settings, add update state, preview categories, explicit export, clearing confirmation, and error recovery.

requirements.requirement: All primary flows are keyboard reachable, labeled, contrast-safe, announced, focus-restored, and reduced-motion compatible in six locales.
prototype_evidence: 52-route real Tab-order walkthrough covering 677 focus stops with 18 native document-boundary transitions, one native roving-radio member skipped by Tab, and zero Pige failures
400 and 760 px Library sidebar Escape focus return
Library and Knowledge retry focus successors
400 and 760 px Note Agent focus containment and focus return
Current-action safe initial focus and focused terminal truth
Named progressbar, current-page, live-region, and roving-radio semantics
936 six-locale layout checks across 52 routes at 400, 760, and 1536 px
requirements.gap: Names, structural ARIA, contrast, reduced motion, composite arrow-key behavior, full Tab order, compact-drawer containment, current-action focus ownership, live-region structure, tested focus return, and six-locale browser layout stress pass. Spoken screen-reader announcements and assembled platform text rendering remain open.

requirements.requirement: Compact, expanded, three-pane, Settings, and narrow states never clip, squeeze fixed rails, or obscure the composer.
prototype_evidence: 936 six-locale checks across 52 routes at 400, 760, and 1536 px
760 px independent sidebar and Note Agent overlay checks with zero horizontal overflow, safe default Agent closure, Escape dismissal, and focus return
1144 px resident 280 / 400 / 432 pane check with persistent sidebar ownership
eight current Pige-only JPEG baseline screenshots
requirements.gap: Prototype has zero horizontal overflow, target text overflow, or visible-control clipping across the 936-route/language/viewport matrix. Targeted 679/680 checks lock the compact Home boundary; targeted 760 and 1144 px checks lock independent overlays below 1112 px and resident pane ownership above it. Production must repeat the governed matrix on assembled macOS and Windows builds.

requirements.requirement: Pige matches the observable ChatGPT/Codex desktop visual grammar for geometry, type, gray hierarchy, icon weight, motion, and control density while retaining Pige identity.
requirements.gap: The common icon family, semantic mapping, and 16/18/20 px rendering are now explicit; equivalent-state raster overlay/difference review across canonical surfaces remains open, and route availability alone is not pixel fidelity.
